message:
feat(tests): add 15 SEC-3.5 tests for hash-chained ledger and calibration (bd-3i9da)

Validates tamper detection (score mutation, broken chain link, forged data hash,
head/tail swap, entry count mismatch, schema mismatch), replay rejection of
tampered ledgers, calibration determinism, objective sensitivity, weight
sensitivity, empty/single-entry edge cases, data hash reproducibility, and
full E2E verify→replay→calibrate pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
